stories.title: Spain Orders Blacklist of Palantir from Public and Private Companies
stories.summary: Spain has ordered a nationwide blacklist of Palantir Technologies, banning both public and private companies from working with the US data analytics giant. The move signals growing European pushback against surveillance-linked AI firms.

stories.title: Reality has a surprising amount of detail (2017)
stories.summary: A classic essay resurfacing on HN about how reality contains far more detail than humans typically notice — relevant to AI researchers grappling with the complexity gap between human intuition and machine reasoning.

stories.title: AI-Designed Vaccine Successfully Completes Initial Human Trials
stories.summary: Researchers at the University of Cambridge announced that an AI-designed vaccine has successfully completed initial human trials, marking the first time a vaccine's key component was designed entirely by artificial intelligence.

stories.title: The short leash AI coding method for beating Fable
stories.summary: A new technique called the 'short leash' method for AI-assisted coding promises better results by tightly constraining the agent's scope. The approach generated significant discussion on best practices for AI coding workflows.

stories.title: Claude-real-video — any LLM can watch a video
stories.summary: An open-source tool that enables any LLM to process and understand video content. The project gained traction on GitHub for bridging the gap between text-only models and video understanding.

stories.title: Hybrid Light-Matter Particle Could Dramatically Speed Up AI Computing
stories.summary: Researchers at Penn have created a hybrid light-matter particle that could dramatically speed up AI computing while using far less energy, potentially replacing some electronic computing processes with ultra-efficient optical alternatives.

stories.title: Zuckerberg says AI agent development going slower than expected
stories.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged that AI agent development is progressing more slowly than anticipated, tempering expectations for autonomous AI systems despite massive industry investment.

stories.title: Show HN: ctx – Search the coding agent history already on your machine
stories.summary: A new CLI tool that lets developers search through their coding agent interaction history stored locally. It indexes past AI coding sessions for easy retrieval and reference.

stories.title: "An AI Job Apocalypse?" — Goldman Sachs Report
stories.summary: Goldman Sachs released a report examining the potential for AI-driven job displacement across industries, analyzing which sectors face the highest risk of automation and workforce disruption.

stories.title: Latest AI News: The Biggest AI Announcements Right Now
stories.summary: A roundup of major AI announcements including reports of over one million AI agents registering on a new platform, subsequent security vulnerabilities discovered, and Meta's acquisition of the company behind it.
